goal: 让 user_goal 只由 mainline start 的 goal 决定，seal 和 Hub 只镜像权威 goal

summary.title: Make user_goal authoritative
summary.what: Seal prepare now mirrors the mainline start goal into summary.user_goal, seal submit canonicalizes any submitted mirror back to the draft goal, view rebuild repairs legacy mirrors from the event goal, and Hub displays IntentView.Goal as the User Goal source.
summary.why: The Hub previously trusted agent-authored seal summary.user_goal, so execution instructions could replace the actual user goal. user_goal needs one lifecycle source of truth: the goal recorded by mainline start.
summary.user_goal: 让 user_goal 只由 mainline start 的 goal 决定，seal 和 Hub 只镜像权威 goal

decisions.chose: Use the draft/event Goal from mainline start as the only authoritative user goal
decisions.rationale: Seal JSON is agent-authored and can contain operational instructions; lifecycle Goal is set once at start time.

decisions.chose: Keep summary.user_goal as a denormalized mirror but canonicalize it at submit and rebuild time
decisions.rationale: Existing JSON and renderers keep the field while old bad mirrors are repaired by sync.

decisions.chose: Populate HubIntent.UserGoal from IntentView.Goal and only fall back to summary.user_goal if Goal is empty
decisions.rationale: Hub should show the lifecycle goal even if a legacy or malformed summary mirror exists.

rejected.alternative: Continue letting seal summary.user_goal define the displayed User Goal
rejected.reason: That leaves the exact bug class in place: agent execution instructions can overwrite what the user originally asked for.
It would be a larger JSON contract change than needed; treating it as a mirror preserves compatibility.

review_notes: Focused tests passed: go test ./internal/engine -run 'TestSealPrepareAndSubmit|TestSeal' -count=1 and go test ./internal/hub -run 'TestBuildHubModel_UserGoalUsesIntentGoal|TestBuildHubModel_TitleFallsBackToGoal|TestBuildHubModel_FlattensView' -count=1.

Built /tmp/mainline-user-goal and dogfooded a temp repo where seal JSON intentionally set summary.user_goal to a wrong execution instruction; view and Hub export both showed the canonical mainline start goal and the wrong string was absent.

go test ./internal/engine ./internal/hub -count=1 hit the default 10m timeout in existing TestPropertyRevertNoteShape during full engine package execution; the isolated TestPropertyRevertNoteShape run with -timeout=20s passed, and internal/hub passed in the full command.

architectural_claims: IntentView.Goal and sealed event Goal are the source of truth for user goal; IntentSummary.UserGoal is a denormalized mirror.
SealSubmit canonicalizes summary.user_goal from the active draft goal before the sealed event is persisted.
Hub model construction prefers IntentView.Goal for the User Goal display path.
behavioral_changes: seal --prepare pre-fills summary.user_goal from the mainline start goal.
seal --submit ignores omitted or incorrect submitted summary.user_goal values and persists the canonical start goal.
sync view rebuild rewrites summary.user_goal from the event goal so older bad mirrors are repaired.
Hub export/detail pages show the lifecycle goal even when summary.user_goal contains stale or wrong text.

data_model_changes.name: IntentSummary.UserGoal mirror
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Rebuild normalizes the mirror from the event goal.

migration_notes: No manual migration is required; rebuilding the view repairs legacy summary.user_goal mirrors from sealed event goals.
